name: shadcn/ui
description: Copy-paste React components built on Radix UI primitives and styled with Tailwind CSS

description.value: Copy-paste React components built on Radix UI primitives and styled with Tailwind CSS

active-maintenance.comment: Very active: 1,204+ commits, latest release December 17, 2025, 425 contributors

framework.comment: React-only. Built for Next.js, Vite, Remix, Astro, Laravel, and other React frameworks

styling-approach.comment: Components use Tailwind CSS for styling, built on unstyled Radix UI primitives

component-model.comment: Wraps headless Radix UI primitives with Tailwind-styled implementations that users can fully customize

typescript.comment: Written in TypeScript (89.8% of codebase) with comprehensive type definitions

ssr-compatible.comment: Full SSR support for Next.js, Remix, Astro, and other frameworks

rsc-compatible.comment: Compatible with React Server Components in Next.js App Router

design-system.comment: No specific design system; provides customizable default styles with focus on developer control

dark-mode.comment: Built-in dark mode with system preference detection and localStorage persistence

theming-system.comment: CSS variables-based theming with multiple pre-built color schemes (neutral, stone, zinc, slate, etc.)

css-variables.comment: Entire theming system built on CSS custom properties

design-tokens.comment: Exportable design tokens including color scales, typography, and spacing

rtl-support.comment: RTL support is on the roadmap but not yet natively implemented. Developers must manually modify components using Tailwind's logical properties (start/end instead of left/right)

component-count.comment: 59 distinct components in official library as of December 2025

text-input.comment: Input component with variants for password, email, search, etc.

textarea.comment: Textarea component for multi-line text input

select.comment: Both Select (custom) and Native Select components available

multi-select.comment: No dedicated multi-select component; can be built using Combobox

combobox.comment: Autocomplete input with command palette and list of suggestions

checkbox.comment: Checkbox component with support for groups

radio.comment: Radio Group component for mutually exclusive selections

switch-toggle.comment: Switch component for binary on/off toggle

number-input.comment: No dedicated number input; use Input with type='number'

tag-input.comment: No built-in tag input component; can be built using Input + Badge

pin-input.comment: Input OTP component for one-time passwords with copy-paste functionality

date-picker.comment: Date Picker built with Popover and Calendar (React Day Picker)

time-picker.comment: No dedicated time picker in official library; available in community extensions

date-range-picker.comment: Date Picker supports range selection with comparison mode

dropzone.comment: No built-in drag-and-drop file upload component

input-groups.comment: Input Group component for combining inputs with addons (icons, buttons, text)

input-with-dropdown.comment: Can be composed using Input Group with Select or Dropdown Menu

button-groups.comment: Button Group component for grouped/segmented buttons

split-button.comment: No dedicated split button; can be built using Button + Dropdown Menu

data-table.comment: Data Table with TanStack Table integration for sorting, filtering, pagination

virtual-infinite-list.comment: No built-in virtualized list; can integrate with react-virtual or similar

list-view.comment: No dedicated styled list component; use Item component as building block

card.comment: Card component with header, content, and footer sections

tag-chip-pill.comment: Badge can be used as tags/chips; Item component also available

calendar.comment: Calendar component for month/week views (React Day Picker based)

toast-notification.comment: Toast component and Sonner integration for notifications

progress-bar.comment: Progress component for determinate progress indication

progress-circle.comment: No circular progress component; Progress is linear only

spinner-loader.comment: Spinner component for indeterminate loading (added November 2025)

empty-state.comment: Empty component for empty content areas (added November 2025)

modal-dialog.comment: Dialog and Alert Dialog components for modal overlays

drawer-sheet.comment: Drawer and Sheet components for slide-in panels

dropdown-menu.comment: Dropdown Menu component for action menus

context-menu.comment: Context Menu component for right-click menus

command-palette.comment: Command component for keyboard-driven command menu

vertical-tabs.comment: Tabs component is horizontal; vertical orientation requires custom styling

pagination.comment: Pagination component with next/previous and page links

navigation-menu.comment: Navigation Menu component for site navigation with dropdowns

sidebar.comment: Sidebar component with collapsible, themeable, and customizable options

grid.comment: No dedicated grid component; use Tailwind grid utilities

stack.comment: No dedicated stack component; use Tailwind flex utilities

container.comment: No dedicated container component; use Tailwind container class

aspect-ratio.comment: Aspect Ratio component for maintaining ratios

collapsible.comment: Collapsible component for expandable content, plus Accordion

resizable.comment: Resizable component for user-resizable panels with keyboard support

splitter.comment: Resizable component provides split pane functionality

rich-text-editors.comment: No official integration; community uses Tiptap, Slate, or Lexical with shadcn/ui components

code-editors.comment: No official integration; users integrate Monaco, CodeMirror, or Prism as needed

chart-libraries.comment: Official Chart component built on Recharts with themed, composable wrappers

form-libraries.comment: Official Form component integrates with React Hook Form and Zod; TanStack Form also documented

animation-libraries.comment: Uses tailwindcss-animate; community extensions integrate Framer Motion (Motion Primitives, Aceternity UI, Indie UI)

icon-libraries.comment: Default style uses Lucide React; New York style uses Radix Icons. Compatible with Heroicons, Material Icons, Font Awesome

date-libraries.comment: Date Picker and Calendar use React Day Picker with date-fns for formatting

aria-compliant.comment: Built on Radix UI primitives which follow WAI-ARIA authoring practices

keyboard-navigation.comment: Full keyboard support inherited from Radix UI primitives

screen-reader-tested.comment: Radix UI is tested with modern browsers and commonly used assistive technologies

focus-management.comment: Focus trapping in modals, proper focus restoration, ARIA descriptions - all from Radix UI

wcag-level.comment: WCAG compliance not explicitly documented, but Radix UI follows accessibility best practices

accessibility-rating.comment: Excellent accessibility built on Radix UI foundation with ARIA compliance, keyboard navigation, and screen reader testing

bundle-size-full.comment: Not applicable - shadcn/ui is copy-paste, not an npm package. No 'full bundle' exists; users only copy components they need

bundle-size-core.comment: Not applicable - components are copied into project. Individual component sizes vary; e.g., Button + dependencies ~5-10KB, Dialog ~15-20KB

tree-shakeable.comment: Inherently tree-shakeable since code is copied directly and only used components are included

zero-runtime.comment: Uses Tailwind CSS (near-zero runtime) but Radix UI components have JavaScript runtime for behavior

lazy-loading.comment: Components can be lazy loaded using React.lazy() and dynamic imports

documentation-quality.comment: Excellent documentation with comprehensive guides, examples, framework-specific installation, theming, accessibility, and interactive playground

interactive-docs.comment: Official Playground example and component preview available; community provides Storybook integrations

storybook.comment: No official Storybook; community-maintained Storybook registries available (shadcn-storybook-registry)

figma-kit.comment: Multiple Figma kits available: free community kit, premium kits from shadcndesign.com, Shadcraft, Shadcn Studio, Ravn, Obra

cli-generator.comment: CLI tool (npx shadcn@latest) for project initialization and adding components; shadcn-ui package deprecated in favor of shadcn

npm-weekly-downloads.comment: ~126k weekly downloads for legacy shadcn-ui package; new 'shadcn' CLI package is actively maintained (v3.6.2)

commercial-support.comment: No commercial support or enterprise tier; MIT licensed open-source project

style-override.comment: Components accept className prop, use CSS variables for theming, and support Radix UI slots pattern

compound-components.comment: Extensive use of compound components: Card.Header/Content/Footer, Form.Item/Label/Control, etc.

render-props.comment: Limited use of render props; primarily uses children and compound component patterns

slots.comment: Inherits Radix UI's slots pattern for content injection and customization

unstyled-mode.comment: Built on unstyled Radix primitives; users can remove Tailwind classes to use components unstyled
